title: Toilet Ventilation Controller
description:
The Toilet Ventilation Controller works in "Sessions". A pulse at the input (Tg) will start or end the session.
Output (S) is switched on directly after being triggered. Output (Fan) switches on after the delay set in Parameter (Fsd).
If input (P) is used, the session starts with a rising edge at input (P) and ends the session at a falling edge, delayed by the duration set in parameter (FPet).

inputs.description: Pulse: Outputs are reset / switched off. On: Block is locked. Dominating input.
Disables all inputs when On. (e.g Child lock, cleaning) Control via user interface is still possible.

outputs.description: On as long as the session is active.
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: Remanence input: If active, the function block retains its previous state after a Miniserver reboot. The state of the function block is saved: – When saving to the Miniserver – At a planned reboot – Before a backup – Once per hour The data is saved on the SD card.
Delay before the fan is switched on after the session started.

1. Time starts with the falling edge of output (S) and extends output (Fan) by set time. 2. When using input (P), time starts with the falling edge of input (P) and extends outputs (S) and (Fan) by set time.
